_note: DESCENT FROM ANTIQUITY. Every dynasty here is real, documented history AMONG ITSELF (Ptolemies, Seleucids, Herodians, Severans, Macedon). The links BETWEEN the ancient world and the medieval Frankish kings are NOT proven — that gap is concentrated in one node, GAPLINK, flagged ⚠. A few inter-dynasty marriages used to weave the lines together are reconstructed and flagged. Ordered youngest->oldest so each child already exists when referenced.
